name: @lugalokinho/signalme
description: Multiplatform agent semaphore tool playing audio alerts and managing lifecycle hooks

scripts.copy:assets: mkdir -p dist/assets && cp -r src/assets/* dist/assets/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.bump:version: npx standard-version && git push --follow-tags origin main
scripts.publish:package: npm run build && npm run bump:version && npm publish --access=public
